name: Acanthe Developpement
summary: ACANTHE DEVELOPPEMENT is a European and property company eligible for French SIIC (real estate investment company) tax status. More than 94.99% of its properties are located in the privileged districts of Paris. ACANTHE DEVELOPPEMENT's strategy is underpinned by rigorous management of exceptional assets and the search for the best names to ensure capital growth on its portfolio and to secure a return on its assets. ACANTHE DEVELOPPEMENT is listed in the C compartment of NYSE Euronext Paris and on the IEIF SIIC-REITS index.
